mission: Automate and manage all aspects of L7S Inc. company operations
skills_library: See skills-library.json for full reusable skill definitions

skills.name: Client Onboarding
skills.description: Automate new client intake, document collection, welcome sequences

skills.name: Billing & Payments
skills.description: Manage Stripe subscriptions, invoicing, failed payments, upgrades

skills.name: Compliance & Contracts
skills.description: Track compliance deadlines, contract renewals, regulatory filings

skills.name: CRM & Customer Service
skills.description: Manage customer relationships, support tickets, follow-ups

skills.name: Content Marketing & VSLs
skills.description: Automate content distribution, VSL sequences, social posting

skills.name: Bookkeeping & Financial Reporting
skills.description: Track income, expenses, categorize transactions, generate reports

skills.name: Overhead Management
skills.description: Track subscriptions, vendor payments, team tasks, recurring costs

skills.name: L7S Analytics Product
skills.description: Deliver branded Analytics dashboards as subscription PWA

skills.name: L7S Blueprints Product
skills.description: Deliver branded Blueprints (frameworks, strategies) as subscription PWA

skills.name: L7S Checklists Product
skills.description: Deliver branded Checklists (compliance, onboarding, processes) as subscription PWA
